name: Pepper Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into strips measuring 2 1/2 inches in length, width, and thickness.
2. In a medium bowl, combine soy sauce, sugar, and minced garlic.
3. Add the steak to the mixture; toss lightly until evenly coated.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 3-4 hours.
5. Drain the steak, discarding the marinade.
6. Heat oil in a skillet or wok. Stir-fry the meat for 5-6 minutes or until no longer pink.
7. Add the julienned green peppers and sliced onion; stir-fry for an additional 3-4 minutes.
8. In a small bowl, mix water and cornstarch until well combined.
9. Pour the cornstarch mixture into the skillet with the meat and vegetables.
10. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until thickened.
11. Serve over hot cooked rice.
